template.name: Trang Huy Logistics - Sale External Layout

t.t-value: doc.company_id if doc and doc.company_id else res_company

div.style: font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; color: #222222;

img.style: display:block; max-height:90px; max-width:100%; width:auto; height:auto; object-fit:contain;
display:inline-block; max-height:62px; max-width:100%; width:auto; height:auto; object-fit:contain;
display:inline-block; max-height:62px; max-width:100%; width:auto; height:auto; object-fit:contain;
display:inline-block; max-height:62px; max-width:100%; width:auto; height:auto; object-fit:contain;

div.style: font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; color: #222222; font-size: 15px;

template.name: Trang Huy Logistics - Báo giá vận chuyển

tr.t-attf-style: background-color: {{ '#f8f9fb' if line_index % 2 == 0 else '#eceff3' }}; page-break-inside: avoid;

span.t-out: ', '.join( (tax.tax_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids if tax.tax_label or tax.name )

div.name: so_total_summary

div.style: margin-top: 16px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.65;

div.t-if: doc.payment_term_id and doc.payment_term_id.note and not is_html_empty(doc.payment_term_id.note)
div.style: margin-top: 5px;
